ksef.description: KSeF API Configuration. Environment: 'test', 'demo', or 'prod'. Token loaded from KSEF_TOKEN environment variable or Docker secret 'ksef_token'.

rate_limit.description: Optional: KSeF API rate limits. Defaults match official limits. Lower these if sharing a token.

notifications.description: Multi-channel notification system. Enable channels by listing them in 'channels' array. All secrets loaded from environment variables or Docker secrets.

pushover.description: Pushover credentials loaded from PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_API_TOKEN (env vars or Docker secrets: pushover_user_key, pushover_api_token)

discord.description: Discord webhook URL loaded from DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL (env var or Docker secret: discord_webhook_url)

slack.description: Slack webhook URL loaded from SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL (env var or Docker secret: slack_webhook_url)

email.description: Email password loaded from EMAIL_PASSWORD (env var or Docker secret: email_password). Configure SMTP settings here.

webhook.description: Webhook token (if needed) loaded from WEBHOOK_TOKEN (env var or Docker secret: webhook_token) into Authorization header

ios_push.description: iOS Push notifications via Monitor KSeF app. Set enabled=true to activate. Credentials auto-generated and stored in DB.

monitoring.description: Monitoring settings. subject_types: Subject1 (sprzedażowe), Subject2 (zakupowe). date_type: Issue | Invoicing | PermanentStorage. timezone: IANA timezone name (default: Europe/Warsaw). logging_level: DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR | CRITICAL (default: INFO)

schedule.description: Schedule configuration. See config.example.json for all scheduling options and examples.

storage.description: File storage settings. save_xml/save_pdf: enable saving invoice files. output_dir: auto-created. folder_structure: subfolder pattern ({year}/{month}/{day}/{type}), empty = flat. file_name_pattern: naming pattern ({type}/{date}/{invoice_number}/{ksef}/{ksef_short}/{seller_nip}/{buyer_nip}). file_exists_strategy: skip/rename/overwrite (default: skip). pdf_templates_dir: optional custom HTML/CSS template for PDF.

prometheus.description: Prometheus metrics endpoint on /metrics. bind_address: '0.0.0.0' for Docker (default), '127.0.0.1' for bare metal. Set enabled: false to disable.

database.description: SQLite database for invoice metadata. Set enabled: false to use JSON state only.

api.description: REST API. auth_token loaded from API_AUTH_TOKEN env var or Docker secret 'api_auth_token'. Auto-generated if empty when enabled. rate_limit: slowapi rate limiting.
